msg_blank_note: recreate: note is empty or whitespace-only
msg_premium_not_acknowledged: recreate uses a premium image model; acknowledge_premium=True is required
msg_missing_carousel_keys: recreate: carousel must carry both carousel_id and run_id
msg_deps_unresolved: recreate: provider/storage is None; the route must resolve deps and gate OPENROUTER_API_KEY before calling recreate_slide (see app.py:478-479)
msg_slide_idx_out_of_range: recreate: slide idx {idx} out of range 0..{max_idx}
msg_apply_idx_out_of_range: apply_recreate: record idx {idx} out of range 0..{max_idx}
msg_hq_cap_exceeded: carousel {carousel_id} reached its HQ-recreate cap of {cap}; no further premium recreates allowed
